globalNews.title: Ebola-hit DR Congo faces 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict, WHO warns
globalNews.summary: Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus said fighting in DR Congo was hampering efforts to stop spread

globalNews.title: Israel orders evacuation of Lebanese city as conflict with Hezbollah escalates
globalNews.summary: Israel's military tells residents of Tyre it will "act forcefully" against the armed group, after another wave of strikes in south and east Lebanon.

globalNews.title: Five people found alive after week trapped in flooded Laos cave
globalNews.summary: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.

globalNews.title: Israeli strike in Gaza City kills new head of Hamas's military wing
globalNews.summary: Hamas says Mohammed Odeh was killed alongside his wife and two children in a strike on a residential building.

globalNews.title: Woman caught after 30 years on the run is jailed for armed robberies
globalNews.summary: Klette was finally caught in a flat in Berlin in 2024 and put on trial last year.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: StakeDAO exploit creates 5.4 trillion vsdCRV but nets only $91K
cryptoNews.summary: PeckShield said the attacker bridged 43.7 ETH to Ethereum after minting trillions of vsdCRV, while EmberCN said most of the remaining tokens had insufficient liquidity to sell.

cryptoNews.title: HTX denies UK sanctions allegations as new data flags $7.6B Russia-linked flows
cryptoNews.summary: UK sanctions Huobi Global S.A., operator of HTX, over alleged role in Russia’s “A7” shadow network, as new analysis claims the exchange handled billions in high‑risk flows.

cryptoNews.title: Banca Sella gets MiCA clearance for crypto services in Italy
cryptoNews.summary: The bank plans to launch digital asset custody, transfer and receipt services in 2026 for selected customer categories.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price shrugs off $1.3B BlackRock ETF block sale
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin’s price stayed firm despite a massive $1.3 billion block sale executed by a mysterious BlackRock ETF holder, which analysts called a sign of large-scale institutional de-risking.

aiNews.title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
aiNews.summary: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.

aiNews.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
aiNews.summary: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding

aiNews.title: ElevenLabs’s new music generation model can switch genres mid-track
aiNews.summary: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting rest of the track

aiNews.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
aiNews.summary: SOND, a startup led by Bose’s former head of sleep products, emerged from stealth with $7M in funding for its AI-powered sleep earbuds.
